data.description:
## Why
Humans should see the workflow graph without a canvas editor; a read-only render over the
canonical text gives that with clean diffs and no round-trip risk.

## What
- Render the coordinate-free DSL to a dagre Mermaid flowchart; CLI `rebar workflow show` + an MCP
  read tool.
- Renders are ephemeral (never committed); pin the Mermaid version; raise maxTextSize/maxEdges at
  the host; degrade gracefully for large graphs.

## Scope
- In: read-only render.
- Out: bidirectional visual canvas editor (out of scope).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] DSL to Mermaid render via CLI + MCP read tool.
- [ ] SVG never committed; large-graph graceful degradation (collapse / "view as text").
- [ ] Deterministic stable IDs and serialization for minimal diffs.
data.title: WS-I: Read-only workflow graph render (Mermaid/dagre)
